description: Official Replicate API schema for black-forest-labs/flux-2-dev

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

go_fast.description: Run faster predictions with additional optimizations.
go_fast.title: Go Fast

height.description: Height of the generated image in text-to-image mode. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32).
height.title: Height

input_images.description: List of input images for image-to-image generation. Maximum 4 images. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
input_images.title: Input Images

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality. Not relevant for .png outputs.
output_quality.title: Output Quality

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
seed.title: Seed

width.description: Width of the generated image in text-to-image mode. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32).
width.title: Width

title: flux-2-dev Input Schema
